description: Red texture viscose shawl with shades of crimson crochet embroidery. Comes with fringe trim.

description: Red cotton shawl with embroidery and appliqued details. Comes with fringe trim.

description: Cornflower blue handloom mixed fabric shawl. Features fringe trim.

description: Green and magenta mixed fabric tribal shawl. Comes with fringe trim.
